name: rosasalberto--didit-age-estimation
description: Integrate Didit Age Estimation standalone API to estimate a person's age from a facial image. Use when the user wants to estimate age, verify age, implement age gating, check if someone is over 18/21, perform age verification for compliance, or use facial analysis for age detection using Didit. Includes passive liveness check. Supports configurable thresholds, adaptive age estimation with ID verification fallback, and per-country age restrictions.
